01 — Token

ON THE TON BLOCK­CHAIN

Signet Ring ($SIGNET) is a token on the TON network. For centuries the signet ring was a personal seal — pressed into wax to sign, to authenticate, to claim ownership.

That same symbolism now lives on-chain. Hold the seal.

03 — Artist

EGOR ZHGUN

All 50 animated gift rings were created by Egor Zhgun. Each ring is an original — gold, silver, galaxy patterns, pixel art, seasonal designs.

Fifty rings. One signature. One token.
